expected_properties: When valid_in is 0, changes on data_in do not affect valid_out or data_out
additional_cases.goal: Verify that module ignores data_in when valid_in is deasserted.
notes: Ensures no spurious accumulation when input not marked valid.
stimulus_intent: Toggle data_in with random values while keeping valid_in low
timing_assumptions: Observe for several cycles after stimulus to confirm stability

expected_properties: Repeated execution of a valid accumulation sequence after reset yields identical output behavior
additional_cases.goal: Confirm deterministic behavior across resets with same input pattern.
notes: Helps catch state leakage across resets.
stimulus_intent: Apply reset, then feed four valid inputs, observe valid_out and data_out; repeat without power cycle
timing_assumptions: Allow conservative observation window after each sequence

expected_properties: valid_out asserted for one cycle after exactly four consecutive valid_in cycles, data_out equals sum of the four data_in values
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate correct accumulation of four inputs and single-cycle valid_out pulse.
notes: Assumes no other inputs between the four valid cycles.
stimulus_intent: Drive a sequence of four cycles with valid_in=1 and distinct data_in values, then deassert valid_in
timing_assumptions: Conservative observation: monitor for at least two cycles after fourth valid input to capture valid_out
